member.name: P:GTA.Ped.CanSufferCriticalHits
member.summary:
Gets or Sets whether this
can suffer critical damage (which deals 1000 times base damages to non-player characters with default weapon configs) when bullets hit this
's head bone or its child bones. If this
can't suffer critical damage, they will take base damage of weapons when bullets hit their head bone or its child bones, just like when bullets hit a bone other than their head bone, its child bones, or limb bones.
member.value:
if this
can suffer critical damage; otherwise,
.
